_note: release/39 canonical Autonom mainnet feed map. adrena_feed_id range 30..141 reserved for Autonom (see adrena/programs/adrena/src/state/pool.rs OracleProvider::feed_id_range). Crypto block 30-35 mirrors ChaosLabs (0-5) order: SOL, jitoSOL, BTC, WBTC, BONK, USDC. WBTC reuses Autonom BTC canonical (3001) as proxy until a dedicated WBTC product exists — two adrena aliases (32, 33) intentionally point at the same canonical, the autonom backend signs each requested alias separately so on-chain receives feed_id=32 and feed_id=33 with the same price. Commodities block 36-39: Gold (XAU), Silver (XAG), WTI Crude (WTI), Brent Crude (XBR) — the launch commodity set for Adrena Autonom pools. The autonom backend at autonom/src/operator/web2/products/config/feed_id_aliases.json must mirror these adrena_feed_id -> autonom_feed_id pairs.

autonom_feed_map._comment: Uses Autonom BTC canonical (3001) as WBTC proxy. Two adrena aliases (32, 33) map to the same canonical; backend signs each requested alias separately so on-chain receives feed_id=32 and feed_id=33 with the same price.
